title: AAICLAS Assistant Vacancy 2026, Apply Online For 62 Posts -
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://www.aaiclas.aero/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the
jobs_info: AAICLAS Assistant Vacancy 2026: AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company (AAICLAS) has issued a notification for the position of Assistant (Security). The recruitment drive comprises 62 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 02-07-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the AAICLAS Assistant Vacancy 2026recruitment is provided below.

vacancy_details.eligibility: 12th (Senior Secondary) from a recognized Board/University/Institution. Minimum 60% marks for General, 55% for SC/ST. Ability to read/speak English, Hindi, and/or the local language.
